transcription.text: If I'd bought Liquid Plumber instead of this crystal drain opener, I wouldn't be bailing out this clogged drain. Liquid Plumber. Just pour it in, and it works. If I had Liquid Plumber, I could be bowling instead of bailing. Liquid Plumber's exclusive formula pours right through water, right to the clog. No bailing, no spooning, no mess. I know, I know. Liquid Plumber. Just pour it in, and it works.
